subcodes.first_line: Say: Glory be unto Thee, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy bounty and Thy hosts, and by the Light wherewith the cities of Thy knowledge were illumined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک بجودک و جنودک و بالنور الذی به اشرقت مدآئن علمک
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @prayer for nearness to God
